movie.actors: James Stewart, Donna Reed, Lionel Barrymore, Thomas Mitchell
movie.awards: Nominated for 5 Oscars. Another 6 wins & 1 nomination.
movie.plot: An angel is sent from Heaven to help a desperately frustrated businessman by showing him what life would have been like if he had never existed.
movie.title: It's a Wonderful Life
movie.writer: Frances Goodrich (screenplay), Albert Hackett (screenplay), Frank Capra (screenplay), Jo Swerling (additional scenes), Philip Van Doren Stern (story)
